across.clue: To ___ someone means to upset that person.
A ___ is a sum of money paid to a kidnapper to set the person free.
Happening or existing for a long time or for all time in the future.
___ is training that helps people follow the rules.
A set of ___ explains how to do something.
An ___ is something that looks real, but doesn’t actually exist.
If something is ___, then it has qualities that are commonly related to women.
not changing in behaviour attitudes or qualities
An ___ is an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult.

down.clue: A ___ is a part of a book that usually has a number or a title.
To ___ a building means to repair it, or to build new structures on it.
To ___ someone or something means to give them a particular description.
If something is ___, it is the right thing to do.
Relating to the ability to think in an intelligent way and to understand things especially difficult or complicated ideas and subjects.
a public occasion when things are sold to the people who offer the most money for them

Happening or coming after something else.

an area where there are many houses usually built at the same time by the same company.
